module.description: Canonical owner of framework operations surfaces.

audit_log.label: Manage audit log
audit_log.description: Review and export framework audit records.

api_management.label: Manage API management
api_management.description: Manage API credentials and inspect the versioned route catalog.

automation_rules.label: Manage automation rules
automation_rules.description: Manage framework automation rules and executions.

deployments.title: Deployments
deployments.description: Run configured deployment profiles and review safe execution status.
deployments.navigation_hint: Execute deployment profiles and review run history.

form.title: Run deployment
form.description: Select an allowlisted profile. Use dry-run to validate without creating artifacts.

fields.dry_run_help: Validate preflight and persistence without copying or publishing artifacts.

profiles.title: Configured profiles
profiles.description: Profiles currently available to the deployment runtime.

grid.title: Deployment history
grid.description: Safe status history without process errors or local paths.

empty.title: No deployment runs
empty.description: Run a configured profile to create history.

messages.failed: The deployment could not be completed. Review the audit log.

tenancy.title: Tenancy diagnostics
tenancy.description: Read-only safe projection of tenant isolation and current resolution.
tenancy.navigation_hint: Review tenant isolation and current resolution.
